title: Code Version Control & Collaboration
subTitle: Managing source code and team workflows with Git, SVN, and GitHub Projects
overviewContent: I use Git and SVN to maintain code quality and enable smooth collaboration across teams. I establish branching strategies to support parallel feature development, and handle code reviews and conflict resolution to keep shared repositories stable. I use GitHub Projects and issue tracking to align tasks with project milestones for transparency and accountability. Through disciplined source control and workflow management, I deliver large-scale applications with reduced integration risk and improved maintainability.
